name: browser_automation
description: Automate browser actions using Playwright. Supports navigation, clicking, typing, scraping, screenshots, and evaluation.

script.description: JavaScript code to run inside a Playwright context. Must return a JSON-serializable result.

args: const { chromium } = require('playwright'); (async () => { const browser = await chromium.launch({ headless: true }); const page = await browser.newPage(); const fn = new Function('page', `return (async () => { ${process.argv[1]} })()`); const result = await fn(page); console.log(JSON.stringify(result)); await browser.close(); })().catch(err => { console.error(err); process.exit(1); });
